verifier_values.criteria: Reports the percentage of female users from the filtered population as 54.05% +/- 0.1%
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: After cleaned both datasets, and identified English-speaking credit card users in the United States who use US dollars for payments, have an active account status and verified email, and have retried no fewer than three payment attempts in 2024. We found that 54.05% filtered users are females.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports the user with the largest total amount spent as 1414.

We found that the TOP 1st users with largest total amount spent is user 1414.
